title: CRIT Tunisie
description: [AI generated] CRIT Tunisie is a subsidiary of the French group CRIT, operating in the human resources and temporary staffing industry. Based in Tunisia, the company provides workforce solutions including temporary employment, permanent recruitment, and outsourcing services. It serves various sectors such as industry, logistics, and services, helping businesses manage their staffing needs efficiently while connecting job seekers with employment opportunities across the country.
